title: Tool Registration and Invocation
description: Developer registers tools; agent invokes them during runs and handles results

use_cases.name: Define Function Tool via Decorator
use_cases.description: Apply @function_tool decorator to a Python function. SDK auto-extracts name, description (docstring), and params_json_schema via inspect + griffe + pydantic.
use_cases.options: name_override, description_override, docstring_style, use_docstring_info, strict_mode, defer_loading, timeout, timeout_behavior, needs_approval, is_enabled, tool_input_guardrails, tool_output_guardrails, failure_error_function

use_cases.name: Create FunctionTool Manually
use_cases.description: Directly instantiate FunctionTool(name, description, params_json_schema, on_invoke_tool). on_invoke_tool is async Callable[[ToolContext, str], Any].
use_cases.example_subclass: ViewImageTool extends FunctionTool, overrides __init__ to inject BaseSandboxSession, sets on_invoke_tool=self._invoke

use_cases.name: Register Tools on Agent
use_cases.description: Pass tools list to Agent(tools=[...]). No separate ToolRegistry class — Agent holds the list directly. Tools can be FunctionTool, hosted tools (WebSearchTool, FileSearchTool, etc.), ComputerTool, or agent-as-tool.

use_cases.name: Group Tools into Namespace
use_cases.description: Call tool_namespace(name, description, tools=[FunctionTool...]) to attach _tool_namespace and _tool_namespace_description metadata to each FunctionTool. Required when using ToolSearchTool for deferred loading.
use_cases.constraint: Requires non-empty name+description; only FunctionTool instances; each tool name validated via validate_function_tool_namespace_shape()

use_cases.name: Enable Deferred Tool Loading
use_cases.description: Set @function_tool(defer_loading=True) to hide tool until ToolSearchTool loads it at runtime. Must pair with ToolSearchTool() in agent tools list.

use_cases.name: Invoke Tool During Agent Run
use_cases.description: Runner executes on_invoke_tool(ctx: ToolContext, json_args: str) -> Any when LLM emits a tool_call. ctx provides run context, tool_name, call_id.
flow: LLM emits tool call with tool name + JSON args
Runner resolves FunctionTool by name (qualified_name property)
Runner checks needs_approval(ctx, params, call_id) -> bool
If approval needed: pause run, emit ToolApprovalItem as interruption

use_cases.name: Handle Tool Output
use_cases.description: Tool returns ToolOutputText | ToolOutputImage | ToolOutputFileContent | str | list. Runner wraps in FunctionToolResult and feeds back to LLM as tool output.
use_cases.result_struct: FunctionToolResult(tool: FunctionTool, output: Any, run_item: RunItem | None, interruptions: list[ToolApprovalItem], agent_run_result: RunResult | None)

use_cases.name: Handle Tool Errors
use_cases.description: On exception: invoke failure_error_function(ctx, error) -> str if set (default: default_tool_error_function). Send error string back to LLM. If failure_error_function=None, re-raise exception and fail run.

use_cases.name: Handle Tool Timeout
use_cases.description: If timeout_seconds set and tool exceeds it: timeout_behavior='error_as_result' returns message to LLM (e.g. 'Tool X timed out after N seconds'); timeout_behavior='raise_exception' raises ToolTimeoutError.
use_cases.note: Only supported for async function tools

use_cases.name: Approve or Reject Tool Call
use_cases.description: When needs_approval=True/callable returns True: run pauses, interruptions appear in RunResult. Developer calls state.approve(call_id) or state.reject(call_id) to resume.

use_cases.name: View Image from Sandbox
use_cases.description: ViewImageTool._invoke(ctx, raw_input) -> calls self.run(ViewImageArgs). Reads file via BaseSandboxSession.read(resolved_path), detects MIME type, base64-encodes payload, returns ToolOutputImage(image_url=data:mime;base64,...) or error string.
use_cases.supported_formats: PNG, JPEG, GIF, WEBP, BMP, TIFF, SVG

use_cases.name: Expose Agent as Tool
use_cases.description: Call agent.as_tool(tool_name, tool_description, ...) to create a FunctionTool with _is_agent_tool=True. When invoked, runs nested Runner.run(sub_agent). Supports custom_output_extractor, on_stream, needs_approval, parameters (structured input).

ViewImageTool.init: __init__(session: BaseSandboxSession, user: str|User|None, needs_approval) -> super().__init__(..., on_invoke_tool=self._invoke)

MCPToolMetadata.note: Used for hosted MCP tools, not FunctionTool directly

key_relationships: Agent holds list[Tool] — no separate ToolRegistry class exists
Runner resolves and invokes FunctionTool.on_invoke_tool during agent run
important_notes: No ToolRegistry class exists — Agent.tools list IS the registry
tool_metadata.py not found; nearest is _mcp_tool_metadata.py (MCPToolMetadata for MCP tools only)
ToolCallResult is not a named class — represented as FunctionToolResult
function_tool decorator uses function_schema() (inspect+griffe+pydantic) for auto schema
Sync functions wrapped in thread executor; async functions called directly
Tool is_enabled checked before invocation — disabled tools hidden from LLM
needs_approval can be bool or async callable(ctx, params, call_id) -> bool
ViewImageTool is in sandbox/capabilities/tools/view_image.py, not top-level
ToolSearchTool enables deferred loading: model loads only needed tools per turn
Tool guardrails (ToolInputGuardrail, ToolOutputGuardrail) run before/after invocation
